AssetOperationalState.description: Current operational state of an asset.
AssetOperationalState.title: AssetOperationalState

AssetType.description:
Type of physical asset in the manufacturing hierarchy.

Follows ISA-95 equipment hierarchy levels where applicable.
AssetType.title: AssetType

description:
A physical location or piece of equipment.

Assets form a hierarchy via parent_id. The location_path provides
a human-readable breadcrumb (e.g. 'Warehouse-A/Floor-1/Rick-3/Pos-12').

source_system.description: Adapter or system that produced this record (e.g. 'whk-wms').
source_system.title: Source System

source_id.description: Primary key of this entity in the source system.
source_id.title: Source Id

captured_at.description: UTC timestamp when this snapshot was captured by Forge.
captured_at.title: Captured At

metadata.description: Source-system-specific fields that don't map to core schema.
metadata.title: Metadata

asset_type.description: ISA-95 hierarchy level or Forge asset classification.

operational_state.description: Current operational state of this asset.

capacity.description: Maximum capacity (units depend on asset type).
capacity.title: Capacity

title: PhysicalAsset
